title: Driving innovation for McDonald's
excerpt:

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

If you’re interested in how one of the world’s most innovative companies is driving efficiency through monday.com, I’ll be running a 30min webinar on the 21st of Nov @12.15pm (GMT), to showcase the McDonalds solution.

Feel free to join by registering here !

I’ll speak through the maccas problem statement, demo the solution, talk through our process and the outcome.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Sounds like such a fun event!

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, thank you, hope to see you there
